_publications._publicationTitle: Neuregulin-1 beta and neuregulin-1 alpha differentially affect the migration and invasion of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: 1 nM NRG-1β maximally stimulating A202 migration...NRG-1α did affect the migration of A202 and B76 cells, producing statistically significant decreases in the migration of these two murine MPNST cell lines
details: NRG-1β at 1 nM maximally stimulated migration, while NRG-1α produced statistically significant decreases in migration in a biphasic manner
